name: @canopy/sync-engine-rn
description: React Native bootstrap helpers for the canopy sync-engine + pod-client. Lifted from apps/folio-mobile 2026-05-08 (Stoop V3 Phase 40.2). Cross-platform sync logic stays in @canopy/sync-engine; this package is the RN-only wiring (background-fetch task bridge, pod-client factory off OidcSessionRN, optional engine builder pass-through).
